# RAPath Japan

> Japan PMDA Medical Device Regulatory Reference

Plain English reference for Japan PMDA medical device regulation — approval pathways, MAH requirements, PMD Act, and post-market obligations.

RAPath is an independent open-source project providing plain English navigation aids for medical device regulatory requirements. Content is written with AI assistance and derived from publicly available official sources only. Always verify against official regulatory sources before making any regulatory decisions. Not legal or regulatory advice.

## Sections

- [Start Here](https://rapath.org/jp/start-here/what-is-a-medical-device)
- [Pre-Market](https://rapath.org/jp/pre-market/classification)
- [Post-Market](https://rapath.org/jp/post-market/overview)
- [MAH & Licences](https://rapath.org/jp/mah-licences/overview)
- [Legislation](https://rapath.org/jp/legislation/pmd-act)
- [What's New](https://rapath.org/jp/whats-new/recent-amendments)

## Official Sources

- [PMDA (English)](https://www.pmda.go.jp/english/)
- [MHLW (English)](https://www.mhlw.go.jp/english/)
- [PMD Act (e-Gov)](https://elaws.e-gov.go.jp/document?lawid=335AC0000000145)
- [JMDN Nomenclature](https://www.pmda.go.jp/english/review-services/reviews/0001.html)
